About Us

Nassau's Best-Value
Boutique Escape

Nestled along West Bay Street — just steps from Cable Beach — The Island Garden Hotel is Nassau's hidden gem for travellers who want comfort without the resort price tag. Just 40 rooms, lush tropical gardens, and a glittering pool await.

Whether you're planning a Bahamian getaway, a layover, or a longer escape — we deliver genuine warmth at prices that let you spend more on what matters.

40
Intimate Rooms
24/7
Front Desk & Security
$120
Rooms From / Night
W.Bay
Near Cable Beach

Everything Included

More Value, No Hidden Costs

Swimming Pool
Sparkling outdoor pool in lush tropical gardens — resort feel at boutique price.
Free High-Speed WiFi
Fast, reliable internet throughout the property — included at no extra charge.
Free Parking
Complimentary on-site parking for all guests — a real saving in Nassau.
Airport Shuttle
Convenient transfers to and from LPIA — just ask at booking.
24-Hour Security
CCTV and round-the-clock security — relax with complete peace of mind.
Tropical Gardens
Beautifully maintained gardens give the property a true island atmosphere.
Air Conditioning
Modern, powerful AC in every room — stay cool on Nassau's warmest days.
Contactless Check-In
Express check-in options — skip the line and get straight to your room.

Find Us

Prime Location
in Nassau

On West Bay Street — Nassau's most convenient corridor — we're steps from Cable Beach, minutes from downtown, and well-placed for Paradise Island day trips.

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything You Want
to Know

The Island Garden Hotel is one of Nassau's best-value boutique hotels with rooms from $120/night. Unlike large Cable Beach resorts charging $250–$500+, we offer a comfortable stay at a fraction of the cost — same Bahamian sun, pool, and beaches.
Yes! We're on West Bay Street, steps from Cable Beach. You get the same beach access as nearby luxury resorts at a fraction of the rate. Rooms from $120 with free WiFi, parking, and pool.
Always book directly on our website. Booking direct guarantees the lowest price with no hidden fees.
Every stay includes free WiFi, free parking, pool access, AC, Smart TV, mini fridge, and 24-hour security. Airport shuttle available on request. No resort fees, no surprise charges.
Absolutely. Our intimate 40-room property delivers personal service and excellent value. Spend less on accommodation and more on experiencing Nassau — the beaches, the food, the culture.
Approximately 10–15 minutes from LPIA by car. We offer an airport shuttle — just share your arrival time at booking.
